top_signals.title: Stocks Rise as Trump Signals US-Iran Deal Is Close: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Wall Street traders drove stocks higher and oil fell as President Donald Trump canceled scheduled strikes against Iran and signaled a deal is close, fueling hopes for an end to the war that has roiled markets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oil tanker CEO sees Hormuz ship traffic quickly increasing if U.S. and Iran reach a deal
top_signals.summary: Many shipowners are just waiting for the threat assessment to be downgraded before crossing Hormuz, Frontline CEO Lars Barstad said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: How Can Lebanon’s Partners Help Strengthen the Lebanese Armed Forces?
top_signals.summary:
The Lebanese state’s lack of effective sovereignty is a crucial problem in efforts to negotiate with Israel and disarm Hizballah. In response to intensified fighting between Israel and Hizballah, the United States began hosting talks between Israel and the Lebanese government in April. However, fighting has continued, and Hizballah recently rejected a proposed ceasefire deal.In 2025, in a historic move, the Lebanese government made plans for the Lebanese Armed Forces to disarm Hizballah. However, the military made slow progress, partly due to fears that more aggressive moves might splinter the Lebanese forces. Meanwhile, Israeli attacks have killed dozens of members

The post How Can Lebanon’s Partners Help Strengthen the Lebanese Armed Forces? appeared first on War on the Rocks.

top_signals.title: From startup to $1.8 trillion: The investors who took a chance on SpaceX now reap the rewards

top_signals.title: JPMorgan says debasement trade retreat has ‘accelerated’ for bitcoin
top_signals.summary: The retreat from the debasement trade has continued for gold and accelerated for bitcoin in recent weeks, JPMorgan analysts said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
